_metadata.taxonomy_description: Hierarchical taxonomy of inter-individual differences with documented relevance to susceptibility to cyber-manipulation of political opinion. Variables are selected for direct mappability to standard social-science survey instruments (ESS, Eurobarometer, ANES, GSS, British Social Attitudes). The tree mixes (a) continuous trait inventories with facet substructure and (b) categorical single-select dimensions. Structure is discovered generically by the pipeline: no inventory names are hardcoded.

inventory_rationales.Big_Five: Canonical personality structure (NEO-PI-R facet resolution). Repeatedly implicated as a moderator of persuasibility and misinformation endorsement. Conscientiousness negatively predicts susceptibility; Neuroticism positively predicts reactivity to fear-based appeals; Openness predicts receptivity to novel framings.
inventory_rationales.Age: Chronological age is a robust demographic moderator of digital-media literacy and susceptibility to online manipulation; directly mappable to ESS/ANES/GSS age items.
inventory_rationales.Sex: Biological sex is a standard covariate in persuasion research; mappable to binary-plus-other demographic measures in ESS/Eurobarometer.
